label: Pairwise FST in windows (region_popstats)
description: Window-wise pairwise FST between TWO sample sets along a coordinate scope. Wraps the existing /api/popstats/groupwise endpoint (Engine F = region_popstats).
intended_use: scan a candidate / cohort for population differentiation

label: Mendelian inheritance check
description: Per-trio Mendelian-error rate along the genome. Inputs: pedigree (trios) + genotype likelihoods (BEAGLE).

label: ngsPedigree — pedigree reconstruction from relatedness
description: Builds the most-likely pedigree (trios / sib groups) from a pairwise-relatedness matrix produced by ngsRelate.

label: ngsRelate — pairwise relatedness from genotype likelihoods
description: Estimates pairwise relatedness coefficients (theta, IBS0/1/2, KING) from a BEAGLE genotype-likelihood file restricted to a sites file. Per-pair scores for all N×(N-1)/2 sample pairs.
intended_use: kinship QC, family detection, pedigree input

label: Nucleotide diversity θπ in windows
description: Window-wise π over one sample set on a coordinate scope. Wraps region_popstats's single-group mode.
